C

check(Iterable<?>) - Static method in class cz.zcu.kiv.brada.primitui.Pick
Display a checkbox list (multiple selection) from a list, using no initial selection and default prompt.
check(Iterable<?>, List<Integer>) - Static method in class cz.zcu.kiv.brada.primitui.Pick
Display a checkbox list (multiple selection) from a list, using default prompt.
check(Iterable<?>, List<Integer>, String) - Static method in class cz.zcu.kiv.brada.primitui.Pick
Display a checkbox list (multiple selection) from a list, using custom prompt.
check(Object[]) - Static method in class cz.zcu.kiv.brada.primitui.Pick
The array-based version of check, using no initial selection and default prompt text.
check(Object[], int[]) - Static method in class cz.zcu.kiv.brada.primitui.Pick
The array-based version of check, using default prompt text.
check(Object[], int[], String) - Static method in class cz.zcu.kiv.brada.primitui.Pick
The array-based version of check, using custom prompt text.
check(String, Object...) - Static method in class cz.zcu.kiv.brada.primitui.Pick
Display a checkbox list (multiple selection) using varargs.

Attempt to clear the console by emitting ANSI escape sequences and flushing the output.

Prompt for yes/no input, using a default prompt.

E

err(Object) - Static method in class cz.zcu.kiv.brada.primitui.Show
Print the string representation of the parameter to stderr, without a trailing newline.

Print a formatted error message to stderr.
errln(Object) - Static method in class cz.zcu.kiv.brada.primitui.Show
Print the string representation of the parameter to stderr, adding a newline.

Display a menu from a list and get the user's choice, using a default prompt text.

Display a menu from an array and get the user's choice, using a default prompt text.

Display a menu from an array, with custom prompt.
menu(String, Object...) - Static method in class cz.zcu.kiv.brada.primitui.Pick
Display a menu composed of provided items' string representations and return the user's choice, using varargs and configurable prompt.
